description: §21.2 Form 1 — an `export <Card>` whose body has more than one top-level markup root (`<div>` + `<span>`) fires E-EXPORT-002. A Form-1 component body MUST be single-rooted markup.
rationale: §21.2 Form 1: `export <ComponentName>...</>` desugars to `export const Name = <single-root>...</>`, so the body must be single-rooted. Two sibling roots (`<div>`, `<span>`) are rejected E-EXPORT-002 (wrap them in a container).
